requestPolicy: Provide references or approvals through an approved secure channel; never place secrets, private keys, seeds, PEM contents, validator keys or full provider credentials in chat or git.

inputs.provide: review owner and approved target commit/PR for Chain Core, Wallet/Auth, Gateway, Explorer/Monitor and Website handoffs
approved staging/public canonical origins and DNS change owner
approved HTTPS URLs, jurisdiction and accountable owners for support, privacy, security and status
secure signer path reference, multisig/governance approvers, timelock policy and recovery ceremony evidence; no key material
approved official Testnet USDC/CCTP or reviewed equivalent, provider account reference, custody/reserve/attestation/legal approvals and outage contact; credentials only through secret manager
auditor engagement/report references, resolved findings and approved activation scope
governed budget, funding provenance, counterparty limits, conflicts and approved public addresses
approved upgrade/removal plan or time-bounded security acceptance for the no-fix adm-zip advisory
